_comment: Character art scene bible. Each scene has a prompt for OpenAI gpt-image-1 and an output_path. STYLE is appended automatically by generate-character-art.js.

scenes.description: Eli's reaction to Margie's Monaco postcard. The first character art piece.
scenes.scene_prompt: Eliza 'Eli' Hartwell, a woman in her early 30s with sharp observational eyes and a slightly tired but amused expression, sits at a cluttered editorial-office desk facing a window. On the wall above her desk is a glossy Mediterranean travel postcard pinned crookedly, reading 'GREETINGS FROM MONACO' in cheerful cursive. Eli's expression is dry, unimpressed, side-eyeing the postcard. In front of her on the desk: an open notebook full of tiny sketches of fire hydrants, a half-finished cup of coffee, and a typewriter. Composition: medium shot, three-quarter angle, Eli is the focal point with the postcard clearly visible as a secondary subject. Single-panel editorial-cartoon framing.

scenes.description: Eli portrait, neutral pose for masthead.
scenes.scene_prompt: Portrait of Eliza 'Eli' Hartwell, Staff Writer at Thiccctionary, a woman in her early 30s with dark hair tied back loosely, intelligent observational eyes, slight knowing smile. She wears a wool cardigan over a button-up. She is holding a small notebook open in one hand, mid-thought. Background: a window with city architecture visible behind her. Composition: shoulders-up portrait, three-quarter angle, soft natural light.

Portrait of Bartholomew 'Bart' Pruss, Senior Cataloguer at Thiccctionary, a man in his mid-50s with thinning hair, wire-rimmed glasses, an immaculately trimmed beard. He wears a tweed jacket over a vest and tie. His expression is severe and lightly disdainful. He holds a stack of formal-looking memoranda. Background: shelves of leather-bound reference volumes. Composition: shoulders-up portrait, slight downward angle as if he is judging the viewer, three-quarter angle.

Portrait of Theodore 'Teddy' Vance, Junior Cataloguer at Thiccctionary, a man in his late 20s with neatly combed hair, an earnest open face, wearing a crisp shirt and sweater vest. He holds an engineering manual or technical reference book, with a small bookmark sticking out. His expression is sincere and slightly hopeful. Background: a wall with a NASA Saturn V cross-section poster pinned up. Composition: shoulders-up portrait, three-quarter angle, warm light.

Portrait of Margaret 'Margie' Whitmore-Hessian, Editor-in-Chief of Thiccctionary, a woman in her mid-60s with silver hair styled in a soft chignon, an expensive blouse, large pearl earrings, an expression of confident vagueness. She holds a glass of wine and gestures vaguely with the other hand mid-anecdote. Background: a sunny terrace overlooking a vineyard, slightly blurred. Composition: shoulders-up portrait, slight upward angle, golden hour light.

Portrait of Hugh Drumm, Voice Editor at Thiccctionary, a man of indeterminate age between 40 and 60 with a perfectly neutral expression. Pale skin, very deliberately combed hair, monochrome shirt buttoned to the top, no tie. He holds a small tin of throat lozenges. He looks directly at the viewer with no apparent emotion. Background: an empty acoustic recording booth, slightly visible foam paneling. Composition: shoulders-up portrait, dead-center symmetrical framing, flat lighting.

scenes.description: Spider Hennessy portrait — but a SILHOUETTE, since no one has met them.
scenes.scene_prompt: Silhouette portrait of 'Spider' Hennessy, the Thiccctionary Field Correspondent whom no one in the office has met. The figure is in heavy shadow against a backlit window, wearing what appears to be a wide-brimmed hat and a long coat. Only the outline is visible. In the foreground on a desk: a postcard from Macau and an open expense report with 'one (1) ferry, unspecified' written on it. Composition: shoulders-up backlit silhouette, dramatic chiaroscuro, mysterious atmosphere.
